title: kentrophyllum tauricum
intro: Kentrophyllum tauricum, also known as mountain club moss, is a type of fern-like plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Kentrophyllum tauricum include its potential to help with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. Kentrophyllum tauricum is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be found in some herbal supplements, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural remedies.
